docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT ALI'S PAINTING & DECORATING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALI'S PAINTING & DECORATING

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALI'S PAINTING & DECORATING $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $160.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ALI'S PAINTING & DECORATING
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ALI'S PAINTING & DECORATING
